creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG

New Revision: 310839
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/310839

Log:

  Submitted by:	clutton <mbsd@isgroup.com.ua>

==============================================================================
--- head/www/xpi-pentadactyl/Makefile	Tue Jan 22 22:17:27 2013	(r310838)
+++ head/www/xpi-pentadactyl/Makefile	Tue Jan 22 22:19:18 2013	(r310839)
@@ -1,17 +1,15 @@
 # Created by: clutton mbsd@isgroup.com.ua
 # $FreeBSD$
 
-PORTNAME=	pentadactyl
-PORTVERSION=	1.0r1
-DISTVERSIONSUFFIX=	-fx
-CATEGORIES=	www
-DISTNAME=	pentadactyl-${PORTVERSION:S/r/rc/}${DISTVERSIONSUFFIX}
+PORTNAME=      pentadactyl
+PORTVERSION=   20130122
+MASTER_SITES=  GOOGLE_CODE
+PROJECTHOST=   dactyl
+CATEGORIES=    www
 
 MAINTAINER=	mbsd@isgroup.com.ua
 COMMENT=	Firefox for Vim and Links addicts
 
-IGNORE=		does not work with firefox 15+
-
 XPI_NUM=	235854
 XPI_ID=		pentadactyl@dactyl.googlecode.com
